questions.q: Who directed the two-part Telugu epic film series 'Baahubali'?
questions.explanation: Both 'Baahubali' films were directed by S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.q: In which year was the first film, 'Baahubali: The Beginning', released?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Beginning' was released in 2015.

questions.q: In which year was the second film, 'Baahubali: The Conclusion', released?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' was released in 2017.

questions.q: Which actor played the dual lead roles of Amarendra Baahubali and Mahendra Baahubali in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Prabhas played both Amarendra Baahubali and his son Mahendra Baahubali.

questions.q: In which original language were the 'Baahubali' films primarily made?
questions.explanation: The 'Baahubali' films were primarily made in Telugu (shot simultaneously in Telugu and Tamil) and dubbed into several other languages.

questions.q: Which famous cliffhanger question at the end of 'Baahubali: The Beginning' became a cultural phenomenon?
options: Where is the kingdom of Mahishmati?
Who is the real heir to the throne?
questions.explanation: The question 'Why did Kattappa kill Baahubali?' became a nationwide talking point after the first film.

questions.q: Which actor played the loyal slave-warrior Kattappa in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Veteran actor Sathyaraj played Kattappa in the 'Baahubali' films.

questions.q: Which actress played the warrior princess Devasena in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Anushka Shetty played Devasena, the princess of Kuntala kingdom.

questions.q: Which actor played the antagonist Bhallaladeva in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Rana Daggubati played the villainous cousin Bhallaladeva.

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional kingdom at the centre of the 'Baahubali' story?
questions.explanation: The 'Baahubali' saga is set in the fictional kingdom of Mahishmati.

questions.q: Who composed the music and background score for the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: M. M. Keeravani composed the music and background score for both 'Baahubali' films.

questions.q: Which actress played the powerful queen mother Sivagami in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Ramya Krishnan played the regal queen mother Rajamata Sivagami.

questions.q: Which actress played Avantika, the rebel warrior, in 'Baahubali: The Beginning'?
questions.explanation: Tamannaah Bhatia played Avantika, the love interest of Mahendra Baahubali in the first film.

questions.q: Under which production banner were the 'Baahubali' films produced?
questions.explanation: The 'Baahubali' films were produced by Shobu Yarlagadda and Prasad Devineni under Arka Media Works.

questions.q: Who wrote the original story of the 'Baahubali' films, on which the screenplay was based?
questions.explanation: The story was written by K. V. Vijayendra Prasad, the father of director S. S. Rajamouli.

questions.q: At the time of its release, 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' became the highest-grossing what?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' became the highest-grossing Indian film at the time of its 2017 release.

questions.q: Which national honour did 'Baahubali: The Beginning' win at the 63rd National Film Awards?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Beginning' won the National Film Award for Best Feature Film at the 63rd National Film Awards, the first Telugu film to win that top honour.

questions.q: Which of these is a celebrated song featured in the 'Baahubali' films, used to glorify the hero?
questions.explanation: 'Saahore Baahubali' is a celebrated song from 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' used to glorify the hero.

questions.q: In the 'Baahubali' story, what relationship is Bhallaladeva to Amarendra Baahubali?
questions.explanation: Bhallaladeva is the cousin of Amarendra Baahubali; both were raised together by Sivagami in Mahishmati.

questions.q: Which city's film studios served as a major production base for the large-scale sets of the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Much of 'Baahubali' was shot at Ramoji Film City in Hyderabad, where elaborate Mahishmati sets were built.

questions.q: Who served as the cinematographer for the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: K. K. Senthil Kumar was the cinematographer for both 'Baahubali' films.

questions.q: Which novelist adapted the 'Baahubali' universe into a popular prequel book series including 'The Rise of Sivagami'?
questions.explanation: Anand Neelakantan wrote 'The Rise of Sivagami' and other novels expanding the Baahubali world.

questions.q: On which streaming platform did the animated prequel series 'Baahubali: The Lost Legends' premiere in 2017?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Lost Legends', an animated series set before the events of the films, premiered on Amazon Prime Video in 2017.

questions.q: Which kingdom does Devasena belong to before marrying Amarendra Baahubali?
questions.explanation: Devasena is the princess of the Kuntala kingdom.

questions.q: What is the name of the barbarian invading tribe that the Mahishmati army battles in the climax of 'Baahubali: The Beginning'?
questions.explanation: The Kalakeya are the fearsome invading tribe fought in the climactic battle of 'Baahubali: The Beginning', their leader speaking a constructed language created for the films.

questions.q: Who created the fictional Kilikili language spoken by the Kalakeya tribe in the 'Baahubali' films?
questions.explanation: Tamil lyricist and linguist Madhan Karky developed the constructed Kilikili language for the Kalakeya.

questions.q: Which weapon does Amarendra Baahubali famously improvise during the climactic battle against the Kalakeya in 'Baahubali: The Beginning'?
options: Two swords joined into one curved double blade
questions.explanation: Baahubali joins two swords into a single curved double-bladed weapon during the Kalakeya battle.

questions.q: Approximately how much was 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' reported to have grossed worldwide, making it a landmark for Indian cinema?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali: The Conclusion' grossed over Rs 1,700 crore worldwide, a record for Indian cinema at the time.

questions.q: In the storyline, why does Kattappa ultimately kill Amarendra Baahubali?
options: Out of personal jealousy over the throne
To avenge the death of Sivagami
He is bound by an oath of loyalty to the throne and is deceived into following Bhallaladeva's order
questions.explanation: Kattappa, bound by his oath of servitude to the throne, is manipulated by Bhallaladeva into stabbing Baahubali in the back.

questions.q: The 'Baahubali' films are widely credited with popularising which industry-wide concept in Indian cinema?
questions.explanation: 'Baahubali' is credited with defining the modern 'pan-India' blockbuster, succeeding across multiple language markets simultaneously.
